candidate_definition_hints.text: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦
Terraform module, which creates almost all supported AWS Lambda resources as well as taking care of building and packaging of required Lambda dependencies for functions and layers.
